g.text: “All the code that's fit to print.”
T H E D A I L Y Y O U
Vol. I, No. 1 — Wednesday, July 1, 2026 — 72°F partly cloudy · Seattle
LATE CITY FINAL — THE LATE NIGHT EDITION
MIDNIGHT REFACTOR PAYS OFF; ORBIT-CAM FINALLY SPOTS THE STATION
test away from mergeable. Today writes itself.

Y E S T E R D A Y
Rewrote the satellite-tracking loop to interpolate between TLE fixes — the Raspberry
Pi caught its first clean ISS pass at 11:48pm.
Taught the fridge-inventory bot to plan three dinners ahead; stopped mid-fix on the
O P E N L O O P S

◦ orbit-cam: 2 uncommitted changes on main (the lens-cap detector)
◦ streaming refactor: one flaky test between you and the merge
T E C H W I R E
G I T H U B

412 pts — your kind of beautiful nonsense

▪ Tigers rout Yankees 9–3; Mets blank Blue Jays 3–0.
▪ Tonali picks Tottenham, citing De Zerbi.
T H E T O P T H R E E
